title: Pondicherry、Puducherry — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Pondicherry、Puducherry的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Pondicherry是Puducherry的一個城市，人口約250,000。A former French colony on the Coromandel Coast, known for its French Quarter, serene beaches, and Sri Aurobindo Ashram.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
